title: Opening — the four-layer gap
thesis: Most defense-AI stacks ship model + pipeline + delivery but leave governance unproven. Killinchu adds a verifiable sense-and-evidence governance overlay.
script: Frame the four-layer gap (model / pipeline / delivery / governance). Killinchu sits in the governance layer: every detection and decision emits a cosign-verifiable Khipu receipt.
expected_output: Audience sees the four-layer diagram with Killinchu in the governance overlay.
fallback: Static slide of the four-layer diagram.
